parameters.name: q
parameters.value: name = 'Job Application Tracker' and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.spreadsheet' and trashed = false

parameters.jsCode:
// Build all sheet setup requests for a new spreadsheet
const d     = $input.first().json;
const appId  = parseInt(d.applicationsSheetId);
const dashId = parseInt(d.dashboardSheetId);
const logId  = parseInt(d.logSheetId);

return [{ json: {
  ...d,
  _setupHeaders: [
    ["Date Applied","Company Name","Job Title","Platform","Status",
     "Email Subject","Email From","Last Updated","Notes","Thread ID","Processed At"]
  ],
  _logHeaders: [
    ["Timestamp","Classification","Company Name","Job Title",
     "Platform","Confidence","Status","Email Subject","From","Reasoning"]
  ],
  _dashValues: [
    ["📊 Job Application Dashboard","",""],
    ["Last Updated:","=NOW()",""],
    ["Metric","Count","Rate"],
    ["Total Applications","=COUNTA(Applications!B2:B)","100%"],
    ["Applied","=COUNTIF(Applications!E2:E,\"Applied\")","=IF(B4>0,TEXT(B5/B4,\"0.0%\"),\"N/A\")"],
    ["Rejected","=COUNTIF(Applications!E2:E,\"Rejected\")","=IF(B4>0,TEXT(B6/B4,\"0.0%\"),\"N/A\")"],
    ["Positive Response","=COUNTIF(Applications!E2:E,\"Positive Response\")","=IF(B4>0,TEXT(B7/B4,\"0.0%\"),\"N/A\")"],
    ["Interview","=COUNTIF(Applications!E2:E,\"Interview\")","=IF(B4>0,TEXT(B8/B4,\"0.0%\"),\"N/A\")"],
    ["Offer","=COUNTIF(Applications!E2:E,\"Offer\")","=IF(B4>0,TEXT(B9/B4,\"0.0%\"),\"N/A\")"],
    ["─────","",""],
    ["Response Rate","=IF(B4>0,TEXT((B6+B7+B8+B9)/B4,\"0.0%\"),\"N/A\")",""],
    ["Success Rate","=IF(B4>0,TEXT((B7+B8+B9)/B4,\"0.0%\"),\"N/A\")",""]
  ],
  _formatRequest: { requests: [
    { repeatCell: { range: { sheetId: appId, startRowIndex:0, endRowIndex:1, startColumnIndex:0, endColumnIndex:11 },
      cell: { userEnteredFormat: { backgroundColor:{red:0.15,green:0.35,blue:0.75}, textFormat:{bold:true,fontSize:11,foregroundColor:{red:1,green:1,blue:1}}, horizontalAlignment:'CENTER' }},
      fields: 'userEnteredFormat(backgroundColor,textFormat,horizontalAlignment)' }},
    { updateSheetProperties: { properties: { sheetId:appId, gridProperties:{frozenRowCount:1} }, fields:'gridProperties.frozenRowCount' }},
    { updateDimensionProperties: { range:{sheetId:appId,dimension:'COLUMNS',startIndex:0,endIndex:1},   properties:{pixelSize:110}, fields:'pixelSize' }},
    { updateDimensionProperties: { range:{sheetId:appId,dimension:'COLUMNS',startIndex:1,endIndex:2},   properties:{pixelSize:200}, fields:'pixelSize' }},
    { updateDimensionProperties: { range:{sheetId:appId,dimension:'COLUMNS',startIndex:2,endIndex:3},   properties:{pixelSize:280}, fields:'pixelSize' }},
    { updateDimensionProperties: { range:{sheetId:appId,dimension:'COLUMNS',startIndex:3,endIndex:4},   properties:{pixelSize:120}, fields:'pixelSize' }},
    { updateDimensionProperties: { range:{sheetId:appId,dimension:'COLUMNS',startIndex:4,endIndex:5},   properties:{pixelSize:140}, fields:'pixelSize' }},
    { updateDimensionProperties: { range:{sheetId:appId,dimension:'COLUMNS',startIndex:5,endIndex:6},   properties:{pixelSize:300}, fields:'pixelSize' }},
    { updateDimensionProperties: { range:{sheetId:appId,dimension:'COLUMNS',startIndex:6,endIndex:7},   properties:{pixelSize:220}, fields:'pixelSize' }},
    { updateDimensionProperties: { range:{sheetId:appId,dimension:'COLUMNS',startIndex:7,endIndex:8},   properties:{pixelSize:110}, fields:'pixelSize' }},
    { updateDimensionProperties: { range:{sheetId:appId,dimension:'COLUMNS',startIndex:8,endIndex:9},   properties:{pixelSize:300}, fields:'pixelSize' }},
    { updateDimensionProperties: { range:{sheetId:appId,dimension:'COLUMNS',startIndex:9,endIndex:10},  properties:{pixelSize:150}, fields:'pixelSize' }},
    { updateDimensionProperties: { range:{sheetId:appId,dimension:'COLUMNS',startIndex:10,endIndex:11}, properties:{pixelSize:180}, fields:'pixelSize' }},
    { addConditionalFormatRule: { rule: { ranges:[{sheetId:appId,startRowIndex:1,startColumnIndex:4,endColumnIndex:5}], booleanRule: { condition:{type:'TEXT_EQ',values:[{userEnteredValue:'Applied'}]}, format:{backgroundColor:{red:0.85,green:0.92,blue:1.0}} } }, index:0 }},
    { addConditionalFormatRule: { rule: { ranges:[{sheetId:appId,startRowIndex:1,startColumnIndex:4,endColumnIndex:5}], booleanRule: { condition:{type:'TEXT_EQ',values:[{userEnteredValue:'Rejected'}]}, format:{backgroundColor:{red:1.0,green:0.8,blue:0.8}} } }, index:1 }},
    { addConditionalFormatRule: { rule: { ranges:[{sheetId:appId,startRowIndex:1,startColumnIndex:4,endColumnIndex:5}], booleanRule: { condition:{type:'TEXT_EQ',values:[{userEnteredValue:'Positive Response'}]}, format:{backgroundColor:{red:0.72,green:0.95,blue:0.72}} } }, index:2 }},
    { addConditionalFormatRule: { rule: { ranges:[{sheetId:appId,startRowIndex:1,startColumnIndex:4,endColumnIndex:5}], booleanRule: { condition:{type:'TEXT_EQ',values:[{userEnteredValue:'Interview'}]}, format:{backgroundColor:{red:1.0,green:0.95,blue:0.6}} } }, index:3 }},
    { addConditionalFormatRule: { rule: { ranges:[{sheetId:appId,startRowIndex:1,startColumnIndex:4,endColumnIndex:5}], booleanRule: { condition:{type:'TEXT_EQ',values:[{userEnteredValue:'Offer'}]}, format:{backgroundColor:{red:0.6,green:1.0,blue:0.6}} } }, index:4 }},
    { repeatCell: { range:{sheetId:dashId,startRowIndex:0,endRowIndex:1,startColumnIndex:0,endColumnIndex:3}, cell:{userEnteredFormat:{backgroundColor:{red:0.1,green:0.3,blue:0.6},textFormat:{bold:true,fontSize:14,foregroundColor:{red:1,green:1,blue:1}}}}, fields:'userEnteredFormat(backgroundColor,textFormat)' }},
    { updateSheetProperties: { properties:{sheetId:dashId,gridProperties:{frozenRowCount:1}}, fields:'gridProperties.frozenRowCount' }},
    { repeatCell: { range:{sheetId:logId,startRowIndex:0,endRowIndex:1,startColumnIndex:0,endColumnIndex:10}, cell:{userEnteredFormat:{backgroundColor:{red:0.2,green:0.2,blue:0.2},textFormat:{bold:true,fontSize:10,foregroundColor:{red:1,green:1,blue:1}}}}, fields:'userEnteredFormat(backgroundColor,textFormat)' }},
    { updateSheetProperties: { properties:{sheetId:logId,gridProperties:{frozenRowCount:1}}, fields:'gridProperties.frozenRowCount' }}
  ]}
} }];

// All 4 setup steps done - pass sheet data through
return [{ json: $('Build Setup Data').first().json }];
